title: Surreal Kinder Joy Egg Swing Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Surreal Kinder Joy Egg Swing Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Hyper-realistic surreal indoor product portrait of adult woman with calm viewer-facing expression sitting inside massive highly detailed Kinder Joy egg converted into a swing chair with white interior seat and orange textured shell. Subject: adult woman with calm viewer-facing expression wears black t-shirt and blue-and-white plaid pajama pants, sits cross-legged inside massive highly detailed Kinder Joy egg converted into a swing chair with white interior seat and orange textured shell, holds a teacup, and looks calmly toward the viewer. Scene: another gigantic wrapped Kinder Joy egg, vintage wooden radio with white dials, tiny bonsai tree, white teacup, and polished wooden tabletop surround the swing base on a polished wooden table in a warm indoor setting with soft blurred background depth. Composition: Fixed medium shot with the giant egg swing chair centered, seated subject inside the white interior, dark chains and curved metal stand visible, secondary wrapped egg at left foreground, props arranged to the right, and shallow depth of field. Signature Elements: Massive Kinder Joy egg converted into a suspended swing chair, white interior seat, orange textured shell, dark chains, curved metal stand, teacup in hand, wrapped Kinder Joy egg on the table, small wooden radio, bonsai accent, warm tabletop, and surreal cozy product scale. Style: Hyper-realistic surreal product portrait with cinematic indoor lighting, detailed wrapper texture, cozy absurd scale, polished advertising realism, and crisp photographic detail. Color Palette: Fixed Kinder Joy orange and white, black clothing, blue-white plaid fabric, warm wood, cream walls, dark metal chains, and soft amber highlights. Lighting: Soft warm directional light from the left with subtle shadows, readable face detail, wrapper highlights, clothing texture, and wooden-surface reflections. Restrictions: Keep one coherent adult subject, stable anatomy, readable Kinder Joy egg chair, clean product wrapper detail, coherent chains and metal stand, polished tabletop props, focused warm background, and crisp advertising-photography finish.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
